recommendations.title: Family Weekend
recommendations.overview: A 16-year-old girl takes her parents hostage after they miss her big jump-roping competition.

recommendations.title: Miss
recommendations.overview: A young man seeking his sexual identity decides to take part in the Miss France beauty pageant.

recommendations.title: The Dressmaker
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Australia, beautiful, talented dressmaker Tilly returns to her tiny hometown to right wrongs from her past. As she tries to reconcile with her mother, she starts to fall in love while transforming the fashion of the town.

recommendations.title: Murder at the Gallop
recommendations.overview: Miss Marple and Mr. Stringer are witnesses to the death by heart attack of elderly, rich Mr. Enderby. Yet they have their doubts about what happened. The police don't believe them, thus leading Miss Marple to yet again investigate by herself.

recommendations.title: Sweet Movie
recommendations.overview: The winner of the Miss World Virginity contest marries, escapes from her masochistic husband and ends up involved in a world of debauchery.

recommendations.title: Toy Soldiers
recommendations.overview: After federal agents arrest a drug czar and put him on trial, the cartel leader's vicious son storms a prep school and takes its students hostage. They rebel against the armed intruders and try to take back their academy by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Miss Stevens
recommendations.overview: Stuck at a crossroads in her personal life, it falls on high school English teacher Miss Stevens to chaperone three of her students — Billy, Margot and Sam — on a weekend trip to a drama competition.

recommendations.title: Afterlife of the Party
recommendations.overview: A social butterfly who dies during her birthday week is given a second chance to right her wrongs on Earth.

recommendations.title: Nighthawks
recommendations.overview: When one of Europe's most lethal terrorists shows up in New York, an elite undercover cop is assigned to take him down by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Coming Home in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.
